instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform an upshift when engine speed exceeds the calibrated threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger upshift when Engine_Speed exceeds Upshift_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM THEN Trigger_Upshift
IF Engine_Speed <= Upshift_RPM THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Engine_Speed > Upshift_RPM AND Engine_Load < Load_Limit THEN Trigger_Upshift
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Disable_Upshift
IF Engine_Speed > Critical_RPM THEN Activate_Engine_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall perform a downshift when engine speed drops below the calibrated limit.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger downshift when Engine_Speed falls below Downshift_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM THEN Trigger_Downshift
IF Engine_Speed >= Downshift_RPM THEN Maintain_Current_Gear
IF Engine_Speed < Downshift_RPM AND Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit THEN Trigger_Downshift
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Disable_Downshift
IF Engine_Speed < Critical_Low_RPM THEN Activate_LowSpeed_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent upshift when engine speed is below minimum limit.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject upshift requests when Engine_Speed is below Min_Upshift_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Min_Upshift_RPM THEN Upshift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed >= Min_Upshift_RPM THEN Upshift_Enable = TRUE
IF Engine_Speed < Min_Upshift_RPM AND Upshift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Upshift
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Upshift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed < Critical_Low_RPM THEN Activate_Protection_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent downshift when engine speed exceeds maximum limit.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject downshift when Engine_Speed exceeds Max_Downshift_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Max_Downshift_RPM THEN Downshift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed <= Max_Downshift_RPM THEN Downshift_Enable = TRUE
IF Engine_Speed > Max_Downshift_RPM AND Downshift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Downshift
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Downshift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed > Critical_RPM THEN Activate_Engine_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable shifting during optimal engine RPM range.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit gear shifts when Engine_Speed is within Optimal_RPM_Range.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed >= Optimal_RPM_Min AND Engine_Speed <= Optimal_RPM_Max THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Engine_Speed < Optimal_RPM_Min OR Engine_Speed > Optimal_RPM_Max THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed NOT_IN Optimal_RPM_Range AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed > Critical_RPM THEN Activate_Engine_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall restrict shifting when engine speed fluctuates excessively.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable shifting when engine speed variation exceeds RPM_Variance.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed_Variation > RPM_Variance THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed_Variation <= RPM_Variance THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Engine_Speed_Variation > RPM_Variance AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed_Variation > Critical_Variance THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall trigger protective action when engine RPM exceeds critical limit.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate engine protection when Engine_Speed exceeds Critical_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Critical_RPM THEN Activate_Engine_Protection
IF Engine_Speed <= Critical_RPM THEN Maintain_Normal_Operation
IF Engine_Speed > Critical_RPM THEN Disable_Upshift
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code
IF Engine_Speed > Emergency_RPM THEN Activate_Emergency_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow shifting during cruising RPM.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit gear shifts when Engine_Speed lies within Cruise_RPM_Range.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed >= Cruise_RPM_Min AND Engine_Speed <= Cruise_RPM_Max THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Engine_Speed < Cruise_RPM_Min OR Engine_Speed > Cruise_RPM_Max THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed NOT_IN Cruise_RPM_Range AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed > Critical_RPM THEN Activate_Protection_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable shifting when engine speed signal is invalid.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shifting when Engine_Speed_Signal_Valid equals FALSE.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed_Signal_Valid = FALSE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed_Signal_Valid = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Engine_Speed_Signal_Valid = FALSE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code
IF Engine_Speed_Signal_Valid = FALSE THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent shifting during very low engine speed conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shifting when Engine_Speed falls below Idle_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed < Idle_RPM THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed >= Idle_RPM THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Engine_Speed < Idle_RPM AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Engine_Speed < Critical_Low_RPM THEN Activate_Idle_Protection
